# ADaM Data Structures {.unnumbered}

This part provides step-by-step guides to creating each of the main ADaM
dataset types using `{admiral}`.

The CDISC ADaM Implementation Guide (ADaMIG v1.3) defines three core data
structures:

| Dataset type | Description | Chapter |
|---|---|---|
| ADSL | Subject-level analysis dataset | [Creating ADSL](adsl.qmd) |
| OCCDS | Occurrence data structure | [Creating an OCCDS ADaM](occds.qmd) |
| BDS Findings | Basic data structure – findings | [Creating a BDS Findings ADaM](bds_finding.qmd) |
| BDS Exposure | Basic data structure – exposure | [Creating a BDS Exposure ADaM](bds_exposure.qmd) |
| BDS TTE | Basic data structure – time to event | [Creating a BDS Time-to-Event ADaM](bds_tte.qmd) |

Each chapter contains a complete, end-to-end example using SDTM data from the
`{pharmaversesdtm}` package (CDISC Pilot Study).
